title: Dong Son Bronze Drum
description: An exquisite cultural symbol of the ancient Lac Viet people.

title: Magical Crossbow
description: A wonderful weapon that helped An Duong Vuong protect Co Loa Citadel.

title: Heaven's Will Magic Sword
description: The sword that helped King Le Loi drive out the Ming invaders.

title: Tank 390
description: The tank that crashed through the gates of Independence Palace on April 30, 1975.

title: Victory Peach Blossom
description: A gift sent from afar by Quang Trung to Ngoc Han after his victory.

title: Bach Dang Wooden Stake
description: A brilliant tactic by Ngo Quyen on the Bach Dang River.
